knowledge_points.name: 公共场所词汇识别
knowledge_points.description: 掌握科学博物馆、邮局、书店、电影院、医院等场所词汇的拼写与认读

knowledge_points.name: 特定地点的方位描述
knowledge_points.description: 运用near, next to, behind等介词描述建筑物之间的相对位置关系

knowledge_points.name: 询问地点与路线的句型
knowledge_points.description: 掌握Where is the...? Is there a...? 及 How can I get there? 的询问方式

knowledge_points.name: 指路指令与方位短语
knowledge_points.description: 掌握turn left, turn right, go straight, crossing等指路动词短语及祈使句用法

knowledge_points.name: 交通工具及出行方式表达
knowledge_points.description: 掌握by bus, by plane, by subway, on foot等交通方式的分类与表达

knowledge_points.name: 频度副词在出行习惯中的应用
knowledge_points.description: 运用always, usually, often, sometimes描述个人出行习惯与频率

knowledge_points.name: 交通标志与安全规则
knowledge_points.description: 识别红绿灯含义及Stop, Don't go等安全标识，掌握交通安全守则句型

knowledge_points.name: be going to 结构表示计划
knowledge_points.description: 掌握be going to + 动词原形结构，描述即将发生的动作或未来的打算

knowledge_points.name: 计划相关的活动词汇与时间状语
knowledge_points.description: 掌握visit, see a film等活动词组及tomorrow, next week等时间表达

knowledge_points.name: 询问并交流未来行程安排
knowledge_points.description: 运用疑问词What/Where/When对未来的计划进行多维度提问与回答

knowledge_points.name: 个人兴趣爱好表达 (Hobbies)
knowledge_points.description: 掌握like + doing句型及各类型爱好词汇（reading stories, singing等）

knowledge_points.name: 一般现在时第三人称单数陈述
knowledge_points.description: 掌握主语为He/She时，动词加-s/-es的规律及lives, teaches, does等变形式

knowledge_points.name: 询问他人信息的特殊疑问句
knowledge_points.description: 运用What are his hobbies? 与 Does he live in...? 进行他人信息的获取调查

knowledge_points.name: 职业名词与工作场所对应
knowledge_points.description: 识别pilot, scientist等职业，并与university, gym等工作场所进行关联

knowledge_points.name: 职业及通勤方式的询问
knowledge_points.description: 掌握What does he do? Where does he work? 及 How does he go to work?

knowledge_points.name: 职业规划与个人兴趣的逻辑关联
knowledge_points.description: 根据If you like..., you can be a... 句式进行职业建议与规划表达

knowledge_points.name: 情绪与心理状态形容词
knowledge_points.description: 准确辨析并使用angry, afraid, sad, worried, happy等描述心理状态

knowledge_points.name: 针对负面情绪提出缓解建议
knowledge_points.description: 掌握You should... 句型及take a deep breath, see a doctor等建议动作

knowledge_points.name: 条件句中表达情绪调节
knowledge_points.description: 理解并运用If...(you feel angry), what should I/you do? 句式进行情景分析

knowledge_points.name: 寓言故事要素拆解与理解
knowledge_points.description: 识别叙事中Setting, Characters, Plot三要素，并理解故事寓意

knowledge_points.name: 综合语言功能句型总结
knowledge_points.description: 全面复习关于问路、交通、计划、爱好、职业、情绪的综合表达

knowledge_points.name: 语音语调与连读技巧
knowledge_points.description: 掌握句子中的重音、自然停顿及辅音元音间的连读技巧
